_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of analytic tools and techniques.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, including scoping, methodology selection, execution, and executive-level communication of findings.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-003 (AB, cosine: 0.530), AB-S-007 (AB, cosine: 0.527).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.546). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [analytic, knowledge, techniques, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytical, communication, complex, designing, executing, execution] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.911, R=0.854). P exceeds R by 0.057 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of analytic tools and techniques." and "Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, incl" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.563 ≈ STS 0.546 (gap 0.018). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [analytic, knowledge, techniques, tools]. WIDAI terms: [analytical, communication, complex, designing, executing, execution].

signals.detail: STS 0.546 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
